title: Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
summary_full: Wishah among at least 260 journalists killed since Israel’s war on Gaza began in October 2023Qatar-based news network Al Jazeera has said one of its journalists was killed by an Israeli strike in Gaza on Saturday, becoming one of the at least 260 Palestinian journalists to have been killed since Israel’s war on Gaza began in October 2023.Ahmed Wishah, a cameraman for the network, was killed in a strike targeting a house in the Bureij refugee camp in central Gaza, the broadcaster said on its website. Continue reading...
